subparts.text: Define E-Commerce and explain its architectural framework
Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of engaging in E- Commerce
What are the differences between e-business and e-commerce?
Explain the Strategic Planning Process in e-business strategies.
Describe the SET protocol for credit card payment in e-commerce
Discuss symmetric and asymmetric encryption techniques used in E-Commerce.
Explain the architecture and infrastructure of mobile commerce
What is a mobile wallet? Discuss its pros and cons

questions.question_text: Discuss in detail the impact of E-Commerce on modern business practices. Provide examples of how it has revolutionized business-to-business , business-to-consumer , and consumer-to-consumer transactions.

Explain the economic potential of electronic commerce. Discuss the incentives for businesses to adopt E-Commerce and analyze the forces driving this adoption. Include real-world examples to support your answer.

Explain the different levels of e-business strategies. How can businesses achieve strategic positioning using these strategies? Illustrate your answer with case studies or examples of successful implementations.

Define ERP in the context of e-business. Discuss its core modules and their functionalities, emphasizing how ERP integrates and streamlines various business processes. Provide examples of industries where ERP has been transformative.
Explain the key security threats in online transactions and discuss in detail how firewalls and VPNs address these threats. Include diagrams to illustrate the functioning of firewalls

Digital signatures are critical for E-Commerce security. Explain their working mechanism, including the role of hashing and encryption. Discuss their legal implications and how they enhance trust in electronic transactions

Discuss the role and components of Wireless Application Protocol in secure mobile commerce transactions. How do emerging technologies like 3G/4G networks support the WAP framework? Provide examples of secure mobile transactions using WAP

Explain the benefits and challenges of mobile payments, mobile portals, and mobile wallets. Include a discussion on the role of Bluetooth and wireless LANs in facilitating secure transactions in mobile commerce.
